allow: Bash(node -e "const { createRequire } = require\(''module''\); const req = createRequire\(import.meta ? import.meta.url : __filename\); try { const { PrismaClient } = req\(''.prisma/client''\); const p = new PrismaClient\(\); p.$connect\(\).then\(\(\) => { console.log\(''DB OK''\); p.$disconnect\(\); }\).catch\(e => console.error\(''DB ERROR:'', e.message\)\); } catch\(e\) { console.error\(''CLIENT ERROR:'', e.message\); }")
